title: PE7 2PG, McCain Foods (G.B.) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BO7724IV/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: McCain Foods (G.B.) Limited   Installation name: Whittlesey Foods Factory   Permit number: EPR/BO7724IV/V007   "
